Interface ComponentStrategy

All Superinterfaces:
Feature, Named, Strategy<Goal>
All Known Implementing Classes:
FOLStrategy, IntegerStrategy, JavaCardDLStrategy, JFOLStrategy, SimplifyTermStrategy, StringStrategy, SymbolicExecutionStrategy, SymExStrategy
public interface ComponentStrategy extends Strategy<Goal>

  • Method Details

    • getDispatcher

      RuleSetDispatchFeature getDispatcher(ComponentStrategy.StrategyAspect aspect)
      The strategy's cost dispatcher.

    • getResponsibilities

      Set<RuleSet> getResponsibilities(ComponentStrategy.StrategyAspect aspect)
      The rule sets this strategy is designed to handle.

    • isResponsibleFor

      boolean isResponsibleFor(BuiltInRule rule)
      Whether this strategy is responsible for the given BuiltInRule. This is necessary as built-in rules have no rule sets.
